stories.headline: Barrick Is Willing to Shuffle Assets as It Eyes Unit Spinoff

stories.headline: Some Thematics Will Stand Out to Be Winners in Long Term: Eastspring's Woon
stories.summary: Christina Woon of Eastspring Investments says the current environment "can be quite interesting from an opportunity perspective because you can capitalize on the nearer term volatility to also pick up some gems over the longer term." (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: Clean Energy Team Wins Salt River Project Election in Arizona

stories.headline: Iran Strait of Hormuz warning adds to shipping uncertainty

stories.headline: Republican wins Marjorie Taylor Greene seat but by tighter margin
